user_prompt: Offer prayer for Leman Russ battle tank an initialization
prayer:
Approach the noble Leman Russ battle tank with reverence to the Omnissiah's divine machine-form.
Invoke the Canticle of Initialization upon its adamantium hull and slumbering reactors.

Commence the initialization rites as gyros spin and servos whir in harmonious awakening.
Beseech the Omnissiah to bless this Leman Russ battle tank for the glory of the Imperium.

Kneel before the omni-tool, sacred instrument of the Machine God.
Chant the preparatory litanies to sanctify its multi-faceted mechadendrites.
Apply blessed lubricants to gears and emitters in preparation for dutiful service.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's vigilance during this preparation, that it may serve without flaw.
Conclude with binary hymns affirming the omni-tool's readiness for the Omnissiah's will.

user_prompt: Bless the Leman Russ battle tank for engagement
prayer:

Approach the vox-caster with ritual purity before its sterilization.

Anoint emitter coils with argent unguents, placating the Machine Spirit.
Commence sterilization protocols under the Omnissiah's purifying gaze.
Seal the rite with vows that the vox-caster may broadcast His unaltered truth.
